NAVAREA XIX 152/23

 1. ROCKET LAUNCHING FROM ANDOYA SPACE SCHEDULED DAILY BETWEEN  0815 TO 1330 UTC 13-26 NOV23
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:
 A. 69-17,5N 016-03.2E
 B. 69-37.8N 015-30.5E 
 C. 69-46.8N 015-43.7E 
 D. 70-03.9N 015-15.2E 
 E. 70-04.8N 014-45.3E
 F. 69-56.6N 014-30.1E 
 G. 69-38.7N 014-51.7E 
 H. 69-36.8N 015- 27,0E 
  I.  69-16.9N 016-00.4E 

 2. CANCEL THIS WARNINGS 261330 UTC NOV23
